channel.title: RAG on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in RAG on Tech Blog

item.title: RAG over Java code with Langchain4j
item.description: Expanding upon the concepts introduced in the previous post and drawing inspiration from RAG over code, this article dives into the integration of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) service. The goal is to empower users to query their Java codebase effectively. Getting Started To embark on this journey, I’ve opted for Java Parser , a powerful tool for traversing Java source code. Let’s begin by incorporating the latest version of Java Parser into our build.
